sections.title: 1.1 `internal/model/provider/echo.go`
1.2 `internal/contract/executor/executor.go` - `safeMarshal`
1.3 `internal/contract/executor/executor.go` - `executeMultiTurn` edge cases
2.1 Human Executor - Error Paths
2.2 Type Validation - Int/Float Edge Cases
3.1 OpenAI/ Anthropic Provider Error Responses
4.1 Tool Permission Scopes - Integration
4.2 MockModelProvider - Tool-Aware Mode
5. Summary of Key Gaps
sections.content:
| File | Missing Tests |
|------|---------------|
| `internal/model/provider/echo.go` | Full coverage needed |
| `internal/model/provider/anthropic.go` | API error handling, response parsing |
| `internal/model/provider/openai.go` | API error handling, response parsing, empty choices |
| `internal/contract/executor/executor.go` | `safeMarshal` panic, `executeMultiTurn` tool errors |
| `internal/human/executor/executor.go` | Duplicate call, not found, wrong status errors |
| `internal/types/types.go` | `AgentError` methods |

---

sections.title: Priority Recommendations
sections.content:
1. **High:** `EchoModelProvider` tests - simple provider, easy coverage win
2. **High:** Human executor error paths - critical for reliability
3. **Medium:** Mock model tool-aware mode - enables proper tool loop testing
4. **Medium:** API provider error handling - needed for production readiness
5. **Low:** `safeMarshal` panic recovery - rarely hit path
